svg.title: Front closet memory fragment (apartment four) - the final threshold preserved
svg.desc: Looking straight at the entry vestibule of the apartment. On the left, the front door of the apartment stands ajar by a narrow gap; through the gap, a fixed warm light from the building hallway, the faint outline of an opposite apartment door, a small wall sconce that does not flicker. A short stretch of inside wall holds a single key hook with a set of keys hanging from it. On the right, the front closet stands open: a top shelf with a hat box and a folded scarf, a hanging rod with a long charcoal overcoat, an empty hanger, a tan trench, and a black blazer; on the floor below, four pairs of shoes are perfectly aligned on a pale runner, and a charcoal cane umbrella leans into the right corner. Lighting is even and cool. Nothing animates.
